# osdgoogle_cluster_waiter (Resource)

Waits for an OSD cluster to become ready. Does not manage any infrastructure.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster to wait for.

### Optional

- `timeout` (Number) Timeout in minutes for the wait. Default is 60.

### Read-Only

- `ready` (Boolean) True when the cluster is ready.
